questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The magnetic susceptibility of a material is independent of the external magnetic field.
questions.reason: Reason (R): It is a measure of the material's response to the magnetic field.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: The magnetic susceptibility of a material is not independent of the external magnetic field. It is indeed a measure of the material's response to the magnetic field, but it can vary with the strength of the field.
